prompt: Generate a set of battery icon with different available percentage (0%, 25%, 50%, 75% and 100%). You should follow the given icon styles in the image.
prompt_refined: Generate a set of five battery icons, designed to represent charge levels of 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% respectively. Each icon should strictly adhere to the minimalistic, monochromatic, and flat graphic style exemplified by the signal strength and Wi-Fi icons in image 1. Ensure the battery fill visually progresses in segments, similar to the increasing number of filled bars or arcs in image 1, with a clean, rounded appearance. Present the set of icons arranged horizontally, ordered from 0% (empty) to 100% (full).
objects: Set of five battery icons arranged horizontally
Battery icon for 25% charge (partially filled with one segment)
Battery icon for 50% charge (partially filled with two segments)
Battery icon for 75% charge (partially filled with three segments)
Visual progression of charge in segments
